name: Cal
philosophy: A clean, calendar-software-first interface anchored on white canvas with black primary CTAs and custom Cal Sans display typography.
trademark_signals: White canvas with black primary CTA (#111111). Buttons are (8px) with confident weight-600 labels. Standard friendly-SaaS button
Custom Cal Sans display typeface for headlines (substituted with Inter weight 600 here). Negative letter-spacing on display sizes
Light-gray card surfaces (#f5f5f5) for feature cards
Product UI fragments embedded directly in cards
ai_slop_avoided: use accent colors (, badge pastels) on primary CTAs. The system is monochrome at the action layer
bold display weight beyond 600. Cal Sans at 700 reads as bombastic
use rounded radius beyond (16px) on cards. Larger radii read as consumer-app, not professional booking software
